catalog.shortDescription: Forge your own tokens and bring assets to life on-chain.
catalog.longDescription: The Crafter module allows you to create and manage SPL tokens directly from your guild. Use them for access, rewards, or as building blocks across your ecosystem.

docs.overview: Crafter is your on-chain forge. It allows you to create fungible tokens that can power access systems, rewards, currencies, or community mechanics.
docs.mechanics:
Creates SPL tokens (legacy standard)

Metadata stored via API or external URI

Full lifecycle control: Mint, Burn, Edit metadata
docs.setup:
Activate Crafter

Create a token (name, symbol, image)

Pay creation fee

Manage supply as needed
docs.pricing:
5 USDC per token (one-time)
Network fees apply for minting/burning

activationInstructions.intro: Forge your tokens. Create SPL fungibles for access passes, tickets, or any on-chain asset.
steps: Mint, burn, or edit as needed
activationInstructions.note: Module is active immediately; billing is per token when you create one.
